name: White Mountain Indoor Golf
about: White Mountain Indoor Golf is a state-of-the-art indoor golf facility equipped with AboutGolf simulator technology, offering access to 75 top courses worldwide, a 360-degree driving range, and a 3Trac system for ball and club data tracking. The venue provides year-round golf opportunities, with options for casual play, weekly leagues, private events, and lessons from a teaching professional. Pricing is structured at $40 per hour on weekdays, with league members enjoying the same rate daily, and corporate events offered in two separate six-week sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: AboutGolf simulator technology providing the most accurate simulation on the market
Access to 75 top courses worldwide and a 360-degree driving range
3Trac system for precise ball and club data tracking

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

faq.answer: No mention of food/drink service or BYOB policy on website.

faq.answer: Approximately 1 hour if familiar with simulators, 1.5 hours if unfamiliar.
